prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-KCIPHAC-275-ASSRTD-10 Product Type: PERSONAL_PILL_DISPENSER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: (6-Pack) ID Pill Holder Key Chain O Ring Cap Plastic Coated Interior (Assorted Colors) Description: Keep medicine pills and IDs safe and organized with the ASR Outdoor Key Chain ID Holder!

The ASR Outdoor Key Chain ID Holder is great for kids, adults and elderly to carry personal and emergency information as well as medicine pills. These key chain containers can be attached to just about any key chain, handbag, jacket or backpack.

The aluminum body and o-ring cap will ensure that contents stay dry during any weather. The plastic coated interior will keep pills from degrading touching the aluminum body. Make sure to keep a few of these around to organize pills, IDs and other important tiny items!

Colors Available: Blue, Red, Black, Green, Silver or Purple Search Terms: id holder pill container waterproof metal storage container edc camping gear Features: - Colors Available: Red, Blue, Black, Purple, Silver or Green - Length: 2.75 inches; Diameter: 0.50 inches; Aluminium Body - O-Ring Cap to Ensure Water Resistance - Easily Clips to Key Chains, Handbags, Jackets, Backpacks & More - Great for Kids, Adults & Elderly to Carry Personal/Emergency Information === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-Pack Pill Holder Key Chain Assorted Colors

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-pk 2.75in Assorted ID Pill Holder Key Chain

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof Aluminum Body, O-Ring Cap, Plastic Coated Interior, Clips To Keychain And Backpack

openai.title_differentiation: Water Resistant O Ring Cap, Aluminum Body, Plastic Lined Interior, Clips To Keys Bags Backpacks, For Pills And IDs
